title: Add AI features with the Vercel AI SDK
summary: Install the Vercel AI SDK, configure an LLM provider (OpenAI / Anthropic), stream text responses, and build a chat UI with useChat.
declaration: I will integrate the Vercel AI SDK into this project to add streaming AI features. This covers the streamText API, route handler setup, tool use, and the useChat React hook for a real-time chat UI. If you need a specific provider (Anthropic, Google, Mistral) or pattern (embeddings, agents), say so before I begin.
